glosses.yue: 銀行轉帳; 醫療轉介
glosses.vi: chuyển khoản ngân hàng; giấy chuyển tuyến

sentences.target: Ich mache die Überweisung gleich online.

translations.de: Ich mache die Überweisung gleich online.
translations.en: I'll do the transfer online now.
translations.es: Voy a hacer la transferencia ahora mismo por internet.
translations.fr: Je fais le virement en ligne tout de suite.
translations.pt: Vou fazer a transferência online agora.
translations.he: אני עושה את ההעברה עכשיו באינטרנט.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ chuyển khoản trực tuyến ngay bây giờ.
translations.nl: Ik maak het geld nu meteen online over.
translations.hi: मैं अभी ऑनलाइन ट्रांसफर कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Θα κάνω τώρα τη μεταφορά διαδικτυακά.
translations.nb: Jeg gjør overføringen på nett nå.
translations.id: Saya akan melakukan transfer online sekarang.
translations.sv: Jag gör överföringen på nätet nu.
translations.ja: 今すぐオンラインで振り込みます。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun serving as the subject.
Finite main verb (1sg, present); denotes performing the action.
Definite article (accusative feminine singular) modifying 'Überweisung'; marks the direct object.
Common noun; direct object of 'mache'. Here refers to a money transfer.
Temporal adverb indicating immediacy; modifies the verb phrase.
Adverb of manner indicating the action is performed via the internet.

sentences.target: Die Überweisung ist heute endlich angekommen.

translations.de: Die Überweisung ist heute endlich angekommen.
translations.es: La transferencia por fin llegó hoy.
translations.fr: Le virement est enfin arrivé aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Il bonifico è finalmente arrivato oggi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这笔钱今天终于到账了。
translations.vi: Tiền chuyển hôm nay cuối cùng cũng vào rồi.
translations.nl: Het geld is vandaag eindelijk binnen.
translations.ro: Transferul a ajuns în sfârșit astăzi.
translations.ja: 振込が今日やっと入金された。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (nominative feminine singular) modifying the subject noun.
Common noun serving as the subject; the entity that has arrived.
Auxiliary verb (3sg, present) forming the present perfect with the participle.
Temporal adverb setting the time frame.
Degree/pragmatic adverb conveying speaker attitude; modifies the clause.
Past participle of the separable verb 'ankommen'; main lexical verb in the perfect construction (prefix 'an-' incorporated in the participle).

sentences.target: Er braucht eine Überweisung zum Orthopäden.

translations.de: Er braucht eine Überweisung zum Orthopäden.
translations.en: He needs a referral to the orthopedist.
translations.es: Necesita una derivación para el traumatólogo.
translations.fr: Il a besoin d’une lettre d’orientation pour l’orthopédiste.
translations.zh-Hans: 他需要一张去看骨科的转诊单。
translations.yue: 佢需要一封轉介信去睇骨科醫生。
translations.pt: Ele precisa de um encaminhamento para o ortopedista.
translations.vi: Anh ấy cần giấy giới thiệu đến bác sĩ chỉnh hình.
translations.ar: هو بحاجة إلى إحالة إلى طبيب عظام.
translations.nl: Hij heeft een verwijzing naar de orthopeed nodig.
translations.hi: उसे हड्डी के डॉक्टर के लिए रेफरल चाहिए.
translations.nb: Han trenger en henvisning til ortopeden.
translations.id: Dia perlu rujukan ke dokter ortopedi.
translations.sv: Han behöver en remiss till ortopeden.
translations.ro: Are nevoie de un bilet de trimitere la ortoped.
translations.da: Han har brug for en henvisning til ortopæden.
translations.ja: 彼は整形外科への紹介状が必要だ。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3sg, present); selects an accusative object.
Indefinite article (accusative feminine singular) modifying 'Überweisung'.
Common noun; direct object of 'braucht'. In this context, a medical referral.
Preposition 'zu' contracted with the article 'dem'; introduces a dative complement indicating destination/recipient.
Common noun in dative singular (weak masculine declension) governed by 'zu(m)'.

sentences.target: Meine Ärztin schickt mir eine Überweisung.

translations.de: Meine Ärztin schickt mir eine Überweisung.
translations.en: My doctor is sending me a referral.
translations.es: Mi doctora me está enviando una derivación.
translations.fr: Mon médecin m’envoie une lettre d’orientation.
translations.it: La mia dottoressa mi sta mandando un’impegnativa.
translations.ko: 제 의사가 저에게 진료의뢰서를 보내고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的医生在给我开转诊单。
translations.yue: 我個女醫生而家俾我一封轉介信。
translations.pt: Minha médica está me enviando um encaminhamento.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ của tôi đang gửi cho tôi giấy giới thiệu.
translations.nl: Mijn arts stuurt me een verwijzing.
translations.hi: मेरी डॉक्टर मुझे एक रेफरल भेज रही है.
translations.el: Η γιατρός μου μου στέλνει παραπεμπτικό.
translations.nb: Legen min sender meg en henvisning.
translations.id: Dokter saya sedang mengirimkan rujukan kepada saya.
translations.sv: Min läkare skickar en remiss till mig.
translations.ro: Medicul meu îmi trimite un bilet de trimitere.
translations.da: Min læge sender mig en henvisning.
translations.ja: 私の医者が私に紹介状を送っている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (feminine nominative singular) modifying 'Ärztin'.
Common noun (feminine); subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb (3sg, present); denotes the act of sending.
1st-person singular dative personal pronoun; indirect object/recipient.
Indefinite article (accusative feminine singular) modifying 'Überweisung'.
Common noun; direct object of 'schickt'. Here, a medical referral being sent.
